creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 241648
databases/clickhouse: update to 23.3.2.1

Don't forget to set the maintainer-approved flag on patches to ensure they'll be looked at.  If the port is unmaintained or maintained by yourself or you have obtained approval already, you can immediately set the flag to "+".  Otherwise set it to "?" with the email address of the maintainer.
